title: DayWil's Mod
description: Items from my unreleased game "EnCountered" aswell as some fun Music Discs
body:
Adds items from my unreleased game "EnCountered" aswell as some fun Music Discs from my music channel "DayWil".

Here are the Additions:

Solarium:
- Southern Solarium
- Northern Solarium
- Lumberland Solarium
(All can be used for Fuel, or to craft Solarium Weapons)

Debuffs:
- Lesser Expiration
- Expiration
- Greater Expiration

Normal Weapons:
- Willion Solar Blade (Inflicts Lesser Expiration)
- BHA Solar Blade (Inflicts Slowness)
- Lumberland Solar Blade (Inflicts Weakness)

Superweapons: (Requires the Dragon Egg, you can only craft one)
- LAWSBER (Shoots a projectile that inflicts Expiration, and inflicts Greater Expiration when used as a Melee Weapon)
- Ruthless Annihilator (Inflicts Blindess, Slowness, and Darkness on hit)

- Ordercore Crystals (Black, White, Red, Orange, Yellow, Green, Cyan, Blue, Purple, and Pink)
- Crystal Nuke (Powerful Explosive)

Music Discs:
- Sunshine
- Darklight
- Reflection
- Infrared
- Nightlife Bounce
- Flaming Lights
(All music added is made by and owned by DayWil / DfxWil, the owner of this mod)
